security.csp: default-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' http://localhost:8000 https://api.anthropic.com ipc: asset:; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data: asset: https:; font-src 'self' data:

bundle.shortDescription: Pre-execution optimisation layer for agentic coding CLIs
bundle.longDescription: Optivia classifies, scores, and synthesises a master prompt before dispatching to Claude Code.
